U 25~1/98-^t.^I.-ni] MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 3rd June 1998. S.O. 483 (E^-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and (3) of Section 3 of the Rehabilitation Council of India Act, 1992 (34 of 1992), the Central Gov- ernment hereby reconstitutes the Rehabilitation Council of India consisting of the following members, With effect from the date of publication of this notification, namely:Бқ” Appointed under clause (a) of sub-section (3) of Section 3: 1. Dr. Thakur V. Hari Prasad, Chairman Thakur Mension, 6-3-682/A, Greenlands Road, Hyderabad 500 482, Andhra Pradesh. Appointed under clause (b) of sub-section (3) of Section 3: 2. Joint Secretary (Disability Division), Member Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment New Delhi. 3. Representative, Member Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, New Delhi. 4. Representative, Member Ministry of Finance, New Delhi. -- 2 of 4 -- [HFTIIБқ”75T^3(ii)] MTOTTtfTTi^m: awrarcr 3 appointed under clause (c) of sub-section (3) of Section 3: 5. Representative, Member University Grants Commission, New Delhi. Appointed under clause (d) of sub-section (3) of Section 3: 6. Representative, Member Indian Council of Medical Research, New Delhi. Appointed under clause (e) of sub-section (3) of Section 3: 7. Secretary, Member Social Welfare, Government of Arunachal Pradesh, Itanagar. 8. Secretary, Member Welfare Department, Government of Bihar, Patna. Appointed under clause (f) of sub-section (3) of Section 3: 9. Prof. P. Jayachandran, Member Principal, Bala Vihar Training School, 6, Laxmipuram Street, Royapeth, Chennai-14, Tamil Nadu. 10. Sister Rha Mary, Member Guidance Home for Adult Deaf Girls, M-ll, 1st Avenue, Ashok Nagar, Chennai-83, Tamil Nadu. 11. Mrs. B. Vacha, Member The Hellen Keller Institute for the Deaf & Blind, Municipal Secondary School, South Wing, Ground Floor, Near Bridge, Mumbai-11, Maharashtra. 12. Shri Manoj Kumar Singh, Member Director, J.M. Institute of Speech & Hearing, Inder Puri P.O., Shastri Nagar, Patna-23, Bihar. 13. Maj. H.P.S. Ahluwalia, Member Chairman, Indian Spinal Injury Centre, Sector-C, Vasant Kunj, New Delhi. 14. Mrs. Mehrin Khosla, Member Principal, Tamana Special School, D-6, Vasant Vihar, New Delhi. Appointed under clause (g) of sub-section (3) of Section 3: 15. Dr. R.K. Srivastava, Member Addl. Director General (Health Services), Government of India and Medical Suptd,, Safdarjung Hospital, New Delhi. 16. Dr. P. Hanumantha Rao, Member Founder Chairman, Sweekar Rehabilitation Institute for the Handicapped, Upkar Circle, Picket, Secunderabad-500003, Andhra Pradesh. 17 Member Dr. M. Raghunath, Associate Professor, Post Graduate Institute of Medical Research, Chandigarh. 18. Dr. Vikram Dutt, Member Indian Spinal Injury Centre, Sector-C, Vasant Kunj, New Delhi. Nominated under clause (!) of sub-section (3) of Section 3: 19. Father Thomas Felix, Member Director, Central Institute & Centre on Mental Retardation, DPI Junction, Jagathy, Thiruvananmapuram, Kerala. 20. Shri Lai Advani, Member President, Indian Assn. of Special Education & Rehabilitation, A-70, DDA Flats, Saket, New Delbi-l 10017. 21. Srat. Vasanti A. Pai, Member President, National Federation for the Mentally. Retardation, 13, Anand Vihar, Vinayaka Vihar, Manipal, Karnataka. Appointed under clause (J) of sub-section (3) of Section 3: 22. Member-Secretary, Member-Secretary Rehabilitation Council of India (ex-officio) [F.N0.25-1/98-DD-DT] GAURICHATTERJI, JL Secy. Note: The Principal notification constituting the Council was published in the Gazette of India Vide No. 25-1/88- HW. IU dated the 22nd June, 1993 and subsequently reconstituted vide No. S.O. 125(E) dated the 14th February, 1996.
